description: The task object passed to the model router. Determines which model handles the request and what it needs to do.

factsToHumanize.note: For output_humanize tasks only — structured facts from deterministic service

customerBrain.note: Full brain for reasoning tasks. Compact brain for customer reply.

routing.input_normalize: openai — gpt-4o-mini — tiny input, structured output
routing.output_humanize: openai — gpt-4o-mini — tiny input, short warm response
routing.customer_reply: openai — gpt-4o or gpt-4o-mini — compact brain
routing.officer_copilot: claude — sonnet or haiku — full relevant timeline
